commands.name: generate

The output directory for generated TypeScript
files

commands.name: watch

options.name: --delay
options.description:
Debounce delay in milliseconds before processing
changes

options.name: --ts-output
options.description:
The output directory for generated TypeScript
files

arguments.name: directory
arguments.description:
The directory path to watch for C# file 
changes

commands.description:
Watch directory for changes and regenerate TypeScript 
definitions automatically
